user_story: As a Manager, I want to select a reporting period with From and To dates, so that I can view team timesheet utilization for a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet Utilization Summary screen; When I open the calendar and set the From and To dates for the Period; Then the report scopes to the selected date range

user_story: As a Manager, I want to choose a View option, so that I can control how the utilization summary is presented
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet Utilization Summary screen; When I select an option from the View dropdown; Then the summary is displayed according to the chosen view

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter the summary by project, so that I can review utilization for a specific project
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet Utilization Summary screen; When I use Select Project to choose a project; Then the summary is filtered to that project

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter the summary by employee, so that I can review utilization for individual team members
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Timesheet Utilization Summary screen; When I use Select Employee to choose one or more employees; Then the summary is filtered to those employees

user_story: As a Manager, I want to run a search with the chosen filters, so that I can generate the utilization summary on demand
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the Period, View, Project and Employee filters; When I click Search; Then the list displays matching utilization records

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the filters, so that I can quickly clear my selections and start a new query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Timesheet Utilization Summary screen; When I click Reset; Then all filter fields are cleared to their defaults

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see productive vs non-productive and utilization vs non-utilization breakdowns per employee across each weekday, so that I can assess how team time is being spent
acceptance_criteria: Given the summary is generated; When I view the list columns; Then each row shows Employee name, Productive vs Non productive, Utilization vs Non utilization and daily values for Su through Sa
